ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Aug-20-2025 Continued To Oct-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of The First Account
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Schultz for and with Elyse Crum, Trustee (via Zoom).

Mr. Schultz confirmed that the first account for the trust was filed last week, and an amended account in the related conservatorship proceeding was filed on Friday and processed this morning.

The Court reviewed Mr. Schultz's response to the OSCs and found good cause. Both OSCs were ordered off calendar.

The Court acknowledged that a future hearing is already scheduled and confirmed that no further dates needed to be set at this time.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear [Re: Successor Trustee Elyse Crum]
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Show Cause Why Attorney Andrew Schultz Should Not Be Sanctioned For Failure To Appear
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of The First Account
Off Calendar May-20-2025 Continued To Jun-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Andrew Schultz (attorney) to appear on June 17, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. An order to Appear will be issued to Elyse Crum (petitioner) to appear on June 17, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Filing of the First Account is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of The First Account
Off Calendar Mar-18-2025 Continued To May-20-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew K. Schultz for Elyse Crum, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Mr. Schultz informed the Court that the probate bookkeeper assisting with the preparation of the accounting schedules recently closed his business to take a full-time job. As a result, the trustee is in the process of finding a replacement to complete the schedules. He requested an additional 60 days to allow time for the trustee to secure a new bookkeeper and finalize the accounting.

The court continued the matter to May 20, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of The First Account
Off Calendar Feb-11-2025 Continued To Mar-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (12 Marsily St, San Francisco, Ca 94112)
Off Calendar Jul-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Schultz appeared by zoom for and with Elyse Crum (trustee) by zoom.
Hugh Groocock (buyer's agent) appeared by zoom for and with Ellen Chang (buyer) by zoom.
Andrew de Vries (seller's agent) appeared by zoom.

The sale was confirmed at $1,050,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. An additional bond in the amount of $139,000.00 is required. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is under submission with the court's intent to grant upon receipt of the additional bond.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-21-2024 Off Calendar

Petition For Authority To List And Sell Settors Former Residence
Off Calendar Feb-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Andrew Schultz, Esq., for Elyse Crum, Petitioner/Successor Trustee.
Caroline Hinshaw, Esq., court-appointed counsel for Anne B. Mitchell, Conservatee.

At the court's query, Mr. Schultz offers testimony in support of his client's petition. Ms. Hinshaw reports that after meeting with her client, her client has no objection to the instant petition. The court summarizes the proposed order. No objections are presented, and the matter is taken under submission. The Order to Appear is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition For Authority To List And Sell Settors Former Residence
Off Calendar Jan-24-2024 Continued To Feb-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Andrew Schultz appeared via zoom for Elyse Crum (petitioner).

Mr. Schultz stated that he has had no communication with Ms. Hinshaw on what her position is on this matter, that settlor's current residence is at the Frank residence, and that she understands the need to sell her prior residence.

The Court orders the appointment of Caroline Hinshaw as attorney for Anne Bowie Mitchell (settlor), as she is the attorney of record for the conservatee on the conservatorship matter.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Caroline Hinshaw (attorney) to appear on February 21, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 . Petition for authority to list and sell settlor's former residence is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
